title: gen1ify for Cobblemon
description: Turn Cobblemon into Gen 1 Only Pokémon
body:
# Summary
This data pack will turn Cobblemon into a relatively Gen 1 experience. No extra forms, no extra evolutions, only Gen 1 pokemon.

Ancient Pokéballs & Held Items remain unchanged, but can be easily modified within the data pack.

## Known Incompatibilities
### Riding
- Some rideable traits of some cobblemon are not fully implemented in Cobblemon and therefore not rideable with this datapack either.
- Once these are completed within Cobblemon, they will be added to the datapack as well.
- Reference Tickets
  - [Riding Controllers](https://gitlab.com/cable-mc/cobblemon/-/work_items/1289)
  - [[1.7] Ridable Pokemon that have no flying data can hover in place.](https://gitlab.com/cable-mc/cobblemon/-/work_items/1673)
  - [[1.7] Ride walk and jump issues.](https://gitlab.com/cable-mc/cobblemon/-/work_items/1690)

### [Cobbreeding](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobbreeding)
_(As of March, 2025, untested in later versions)_
- The mod seems to search for all pokemon during an egg spawn, but the gen1ify removes most, leading to a crash

## Updating
For any patches/updates I make, just replace the datapack file in your world folder with the new one. For the mod, replacing the mod should work fine.

## FAQ
Feel free to reach out to me (gabecurran) in the [Cobblemon Discord](https://discord.gg/sFjNz4mHjD) for any questions!
